title: Singed
writer: Gertrude Orr, Adela Rogers St. Johns
actors: Blanche Sweet, Warner Baxter, James Wang
plot: Dolly, a dance hall girl, loves Royce Wingate, an irresponsible chap. To escape their way of life she secretly backs an oil well in which he has an interest, and both become wealthy. In New York, Royce becomes a financial power on...
